M-028.NAME: alembic-migrations
M-028.path: backend/alembic/ backend/app/core/migrations.py docs/plans/Phase-43.xml docs/plans/Phase-44.xml docs/plans/Phase-45.xml docs/plans/Phase-69.xml
M-028.owns: database schema migration infrastructure, nullable VPN client preshared-key migration, MTProto assignment migration, password reset token migration, pending trial activation migration, and migration helper functions extracted from database.py

exports.fn-alembic-env: Async Alembic environment configured with SQLModel metadata
exports.fn-migration-helpers: Database migration utilities for schema introspection and data migration
exports.fn-vpn-client-psk-migration: Adds nullable encrypted preshared-key storage without invalidating existing clients
exports.fn-mtproto-assignment-migration: Adds mtproto_assignments with unique user and SNI indexes
exports.fn-mtproto-phase43-observability-migrati: Adds MTProto encrypted IP observations, admin alerts, and TTL IP block record tables.
exports.fn-password-reset-token-migration: Adds password_reset_tokens with token hash uniqueness, status indexes, and user/email lookup indexes.
exports.fn-pending-trial-activation-migration: Adds subscriptions.pending_activation, activated_at, trial_duration_days, and lookup indexes.

M-028.phase-69-schema-decision: No new migration is required: referral bonus grants reuse subscriptions.pending_activation, trial_duration_days, and access_label, which are already migration/runtime-compatibility owned.
M-028.evidence: pass-local 2026-06-01: Phase-44 migration metadata guard passed and verifies password_reset_tokens schema ownership after Phase-43. Phase-45 migration metadata guard passed and verifies pending trial activation schema after Phase-44 plus runtime compatibility helper. pass-local 2026-06-04: Phase-69 confirmed no schema change is needed for referral-bonus pending grants.

disaster-recovery-role.role-1: Phase-22 restore validation must compare source and restored migration state before cutover.
disaster-recovery-role.role-2: Schema or migration-state mismatch blocks emergency relocation until the operator resolves or explicitly waives the risk.

M-028.hotspot: H-012: Alembic migrations must be backward compatible with existing SQLModel.create_all behavior during transition period
H-017: Preshared-key schema must be nullable for legacy peers and mandatory only for new rotations
